title: How do I create a QuickCrate account?
body: Creating a QuickCrate account takes under a minute. Download the QuickCrate app from the App Store or Google Play, or visit our website. Tap 'Sign Up', enter your mobile number, and verify it with the OTP sent via SMS. Next, enter your name and email address (optional but recommended for invoice delivery). Set a PIN for the app (used as a quick login method). Finally, add your first delivery address and you're ready to shop. You can also sign up using your Google or Apple account via 'Continue with Google / Apple' — this links your email and creates an account without a separate password. Your account is linked to your phone number and can be accessed from multiple devices after OTP verification. All your orders, addresses, and preferences are synced across devices.

title: How do I reset my QuickCrate login PIN or password?
body: QuickCrate uses a mobile-number-based OTP login, so there's no traditional password to reset. If you've forgotten your app PIN, tap 'Forgot PIN' on the login screen and verify your identity via OTP to your registered number. You'll then be prompted to set a new 4 or 6-digit PIN. If you no longer have access to your registered phone number, contact support via email at help@quickcrate.in with your account details (name, email, old phone number) for account recovery. For Google or Apple sign-in accounts, your access is managed by the respective provider — reset your Google or Apple ID password to regain access. QuickCrate never stores your Google or Apple credentials; we only receive a unique token for identification.

title: How do I update my phone number or email on my account?
body: To update your registered phone number, go to Account → Personal Details → Change Mobile Number. You'll need to verify your new number with an OTP and confirm ownership of the old number as well (dual OTP verification for security). Once changed, your new number becomes the primary login credential. To update your email address, go to Account → Personal Details → Change Email and enter the new address; a verification link is sent to the new email. Email updates do not require the old email to be verified. Note that some account-linked services (like referral credits and gift cards tied to your email) will automatically transfer to the updated email. If you're having trouble updating, contact support — manual updates require identity verification.

title: Can I have multiple QuickCrate accounts?
body: QuickCrate allows only one account per mobile phone number, as accounts are phone-number-based. However, you may create separate accounts with different phone numbers. Keep in mind that referral bonuses and first-order discounts are issued per unique user (verified by phone number, device, and address), so creating multiple accounts to claim these benefits multiple times violates our Terms of Service and may result in account suspension. For households, we recommend using one account with multiple delivery addresses saved under different labels. For businesses needing multiple user logins under one billing entity, QuickCrate Business Accounts offer multi-user access (see the Business Accounts section for details).

title: How do I delete my QuickCrate account?
body: You can permanently delete your QuickCrate account from Account → Settings → Delete Account. Before deleting, ensure that all pending orders are completed and any QuickCrate Wallet balance is transferred to your bank (request under Account → QuickCrate Wallet → Transfer to Bank). Once deleted, all your personal data (name, phone, address history, order history) is permanently erased from our active systems within 30 days, in compliance with India's Personal Data Protection rules. Some data may be retained for up to 90 days in backup archives before permanent deletion. Account deletion is irreversible — you will lose all order history, wallet balance, and earned rewards. After deletion, your phone number can be used to create a fresh account after 30 days.

title: How do I manage my notification preferences?
body: You can control QuickCrate's notifications from Account → Notification Preferences. Available controls include: order status updates (recommended to keep on), promotional offers and discounts, new product arrivals, delivery slot reminders, and QuickCrate news. You can toggle each category on or off independently. Push notifications can be managed here or directly from your phone's system notification settings. SMS notifications for order confirmations and OTPs cannot be turned off as they are transactional and required for security. Email notifications can be controlled separately — enter your email preferences at Account → Notification Preferences → Email. We recommend keeping at least order status push notifications active so you don't miss updates during delivery.

title: How do I manage saved delivery addresses?
body: You can store up to 10 delivery addresses on your QuickCrate account. To manage them, go to Account → Saved Addresses. Here you can add a new address (by typing it manually or using the map pin to drop a precise location), edit an existing address, or delete one. Each address can be labeled (Home, Work, Mom's Place, etc.) for easy selection at checkout. The 'Default Address' is pre-selected at checkout; tap any address and select 'Set as Default' to change it. Addresses are automatically geocoded to ensure accurate routing. If an address is in an area QuickCrate does not yet serve, it will be saved but flagged as 'Outside Delivery Zone'. QuickCrate uses Google Maps integration for address lookup — start typing and choose from the suggestions for accuracy.

title: What is the QuickCrate referral program?
body: QuickCrate's referral program rewards you for bringing new users to the platform. To find your referral code, go to Account → Refer & Earn. Share your unique code with friends via WhatsApp, SMS, or social media. When a new user signs up using your code and places their first order of ₹200 or more, both you and the new user earn ₹100 in QuickCrate Wallet credits. Your referral credit is added to your wallet within 24 hours of the referee's first qualifying order. There is no limit to the number of referrals you can make, but each phone number can only be referred once. Referral credits expire 6 months after being issued. Self-referrals (referring yourself via a second number) are detected and invalidated by our system.

title: How is my data protected on QuickCrate?
body: QuickCrate takes data privacy seriously. We collect only the data necessary to provide our service: your name, phone number, delivery addresses, payment tokens (not actual card numbers), and order history. This data is stored on encrypted servers in India. We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Our data practices comply with India's Information Technology (Amendment) Act and align with global best practices. You can request a copy of your personal data at any time by emailing privacy@quickcrate.in — we'll send you a downloadable report within 7 days. You can also request deletion of your account and all associated data (see 'How do I delete my QuickCrate account?'). Review our full Privacy Policy at quickcrate.in/privacy.

title: Can I use QuickCrate without creating an account?
body: QuickCrate requires an account to place orders, as your phone number is used to verify your identity, track your orders, and issue refunds. However, you can browse the catalog without logging in — product listings, prices, and availability are visible as a guest. To add items to cart or checkout, you'll be prompted to log in or sign up. The sign-up process is fast (under 60 seconds with just your phone number) and requires no password. For users who prefer minimal data sharing, QuickCrate offers guest checkout in certain cities (pilot feature) — enter your phone number and OTP at checkout without creating a full profile. Guest orders have limited features: no order history, no returns from the app, and no wallet or referral access.
